cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to work through this problem step by step. So, the question is about Jane's birthday and figuring out the date one week from her 16th birthday. Let me start by breaking down the information given. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2000. Now, February typically has 28 days, but in a leap year, it has 29. Since 2000 is a leap year (divisible by 400), the last day of February 2000 would be February 29, 2000. So Jane's birthday is on 02/29/2000. Now, today is her 16th birthday. So we need to figure out what date that is. Since she was born in 2000, her 16th birthday would be in 2000 + 16 = 2016. However, here's the catch: February 29th only occurs every four years. So in years that aren't leap years, people born on February 29th often celebrate their birthdays on February 28th or March 1st. But the problem says "today is her 16-year-old birthday," so we need to figure out what the actual date would be in 2016. 2016 is a leap year as well
